rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" applied to a dense technical passage unambiguously targets sentence- and paragraph-level quality — reducing verbosity, smoothing cadence, tightening word choice, and improving readability — making writing polish the sole load-bearing R1 responsibility. R1.5 is pinned at exactly 0.3 (peripheral) because minor paragraph-boundary adjustments may arise incidentally during polish, but no structural reorganization was requested and none is required to satisfy the delegation.
